cells.rationale: Killing a live session mid-turn is a catastrophic correctness invariant across reconcile-core/autopilot/daemon/reducer with a receipt-join fold extension that must stay re-fold deterministic — a nameable subtle-correctness opus gate at contract-touching xhigh.

Dead-session claim release rides fold-restriction machinery where double-release and reviving sessions are the failure class and every condition must re-check idempotently in a deterministic fold — a subtle-correctness invariant warranting opus at contract-shaped xhigh.
